content:
All 7 Electron main process files have been created successfully at `C:\Users\DELL\.gemini\antigravity\scratch\aadhaar-photo-printer\src\main\`:

| File | Size | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `main.js` | 15,830 B | Main process entry point — single-instance lock, BrowserWindow (1200×800, min 1024×700), security-hardened webPreferences, all IPC handlers registered from other modules, full lifecycle management |
| `preload.js` | 10,277 B | Secure contextBridge with channel whitelisting — exposes `window.electronAPI` with 23 methods covering photo, print, file, store, customer, AI, and utility operations |
| `imageProcessor.js` | 8,333 B | Sharp-based processing — auto-rotate, resize to 413×531px (35mm×45mm @300DPI), smart crop with `attention` position, normalise, brightness/contrast/saturation, batch processing with progress callbacks, thumbnail generation. Includes asar-unpacked fallback for Sharp loading |
| `printManager.js` | 15,233 B | Print & PDF export — hidden BrowserWindow rendering, exact mm-based A4 layouts (4×3 default = 12 photos, 5×3 = 15, 1×1 = single), CSS grid with cut guides, `webContents.print()` and `printToPDF()`, ink usage estimation |
| `dataStore.js` | 10,217 B | JSON-file-based persistent storage (avoids electron-store ESM issues) — settings, daily print counts (auto-pruned to 90 days), customers (capped at 100), recent photos (capped at 50), atomic save with temp-file-then-rename |
| `fileManager.js` | 11,144 B | File operations — save to recent folder (auto-limit 50 files), list recent with thumbnails, customer-named backups to Documents/AadhaarPhotoPrinter/backup/YYYY-MM-DD/[name]/, cleanup of files older than 30 days |
| `geminiAI.js` | 12,875 B | Gemini Vision AI (gemini-2.0-flash) — analyzes photos for face visibility, position, background, lighting, orientation, suitability score 1–10. Fully optional with graceful fallbacks, 10-second timeouts, structured JSON response parsing, API key validation |

**Key design decisions:**
- All files use CommonJS (`require`) — no ESM complications
- Every IPC handler is wrapped in try-catch with structured error responses
- DataStore uses plain `fs` + JSON instead of `electron-store` to avoid ESM/CJS compatibility issues
- Sharp loads with asar-unpacked fallback path for packaged builds
- Gemini AI is 100% optional — app works fully without it, all API calls have timeouts
- Print HTML uses exact millimetre CSS measurements matching A4 paper specifications
- Channel whitelisting in preload.js prevents unauthorized IPC access

toolCall.name: send_message
